title: Found error in internal cell while parsing Verilog

features.name: ternary with constant condition in comparison
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with constant condition (0 or 1) where both branches reference the same signed signal, used in a comparison expression
features.snippet:
input signed [5:0] b5;
assign y15 = (0 ? b5 : b5) > 0;

features.name: ternary operator with constant false condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the condition is the constant 0, causing the false branch to always be selected
